title: Vertical Slab Placement
description: Allows all vanilla slabs to be placed vertically.
body:
## THIS MOD IS FUNCTIONALLY REPLACED BY THE MUCH BETTER [FULL SLABS](https://modrinth.com/mod/full-slabs)

## What does this mod do?
This mod adds the ability to place all vanilla slabs vertically as well as horizontally. You can place any slab vertically by targeting the edges of a block face, and you can target the center to place it flat against it.
## What doesn't this mod do?
There are no extra items or blocks added, this is entirely a replacement for the vanilla slab mechanics. There is currently no compatibility with modded slabs, however you will still be able to place them without issues (just don't expect the models to look correct).
## Known issues
- MoreCulling's BlockState culling will cause faces to be incorrectly culled.
